original.query: I’ve been invited to a weekend hangout where everyone’s expected to show up solo and “not talk shop.” Based on my current day-to-day situation, what’s the main reason I might choose to bring up coordination with others anyway, and what’s one tactful way to do it without sounding like I’m turning it into a work thing?
